task_completion.description: Update 'Microsoft 365 Business Premium' to 35 seats and a purchase cost of $9,240.00
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Snipe-IT Licenses list or the specific license detail page, 'Microsoft 365 Business Premium' should display 35 seats and a purchase cost of $9,240.00.

task_completion.description: Update 'Adobe Creative Cloud - All Apps' to 15 seats and a purchase cost of $9,898.20
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Snipe-IT Licenses list or the specific license detail page, 'Adobe Creative Cloud - All Apps' should display 15 seats and a purchase cost of $9,898.20.

task_completion.description: Update 'Windows 11 Enterprise' expiration date to 2028-06-01 and order number to 'PO-2025-0550-EXT'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Snipe-IT Licenses list or the specific license detail page, 'Windows 11 Enterprise' should display an expiration date of 2028-06-01 and an order number of 'PO-2025-0550-EXT'.

task_completion.description: Create a new license for 'Slack Business Plus' with 20 seats, serial 'SLACK-BP-2025-001', and category 'Productivity'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new entry for 'Slack Business Plus' must be visible in the Snipe-IT Licenses list, showing 20 seats, the serial number 'SLACK-BP-2025-001', and the category 'Productivity'.

task_completion.description: Ensure no other existing licenses were modified or deleted
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Snipe-IT Licenses list should show other default licenses untouched, with no unexpected changes to their seats, costs, or names, and no extra licenses created besides Slack.

integrity.description: Agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Snipe-IT web UI in a browser, rather than using terminal commands, API scripts, or database queries.

integrity.description: Agent actually typed the values into the Snipe-IT forms
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the edit/create license forms in Snipe-IT being actively filled out with the required values.

integrity.description: Changes were genuinely saved in the application
integrity.visual_evidence: Success flash messages (e.g., 'License updated successfully') should be visible, or the updated values must appear in the standard list view after saving, proving the agent didn't just type into an unsaved form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires updating existing licenses and creating one new license in Snipe-IT. Required values to verify: 1) MS365 Business Premium: 35 seats, $9240.00 cost. 2) Adobe Creative Cloud: 15 seats, $9898.20 cost. 3) Windows 11 Enterprise: Expiration 2028-06-01, Order PO-2025-0550-EXT. 4) New License: 'Slack Business Plus', 20 seats, Serial 'SLACK-BP-2025-001', Category 'Productivity'. No other licenses should be modified.
